title: bertolonia lucernula
intro: Bertolonia lucernula, also known as the 'Sensitive Plant', is a tropical species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Grossulariaceae. The Bertolonia lucernula has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Bertolonia lucernula is often used in teas, infusions, and creams to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
